snippet.title: Albina - Tick-Tock - Croatia 🇭🇷 - National Final Performance - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Albina will represent Croatia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song Tick-Tock. She won Dora 2021, the Croatian national selection show for the Eurovision Song Contest.

Video by: HRT

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Shop the official Eurovision Song Contest merchandise: https://shop.eurovision.tv/

snippet.description:

► Amazon: http://smarturl.it/Fobije/az

Music, arrangement & mix: Joca Stefanović
Lyrics: Jovana Radosavljević


#FOBIJE

Ide priča da u oku mom đavo stanuje
Noć je gore
Jutra hladna k’o led

Da se svima
Pakao samo raduje
Jer tu ljubav ne stiže na red

A ti znaš, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
Loše skrojila

Nema sad šanse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije

Pored mene
Samo ranjene duše padaju
K’o da sada
Samo radim na zlo
Baš od one,
One što za ljubav bi dala sve
Jedan posto
Nije ostalo

A ti znaš, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
Loše skrojila

Nema sad šanse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije

Music: Bojan Vasić
Lyrics: Aleksandar Tomić-Tomica, Edita Aradinović

Trumpet: Miloš Nikolić

Guitar: Saša Sedlar
Bass: Miroslav Tovirac

Mix: Jan Magdevski
Master: Jan Magdevski

🎵 Stream:
Deezer: http://bit.ly/2Zw8yUw
Spotify: http://spoti.fi/3pHmo0W
Apple: http://apple.co/2NqaWtp

Directed by: Nemanja Novaković
DoP: Lazar Bogdanović
Producer: Aleksandar Pejčić
Video Production: NN-media +38162357368

Editing: Nemanja Novaković/Aleksandar Kasalica
Color Correction: Nikola Marinković
Camera: Artcorestudio
Lighting: Sapa Light

Actor: Nikola 

Makeup: Ena Jović
Costume: Dijana Malnar
Hair: Jovana Jeremić



LYRICS:
Svaki sat, svaki sprat ja sam brojala,
Noćima ispred tvojih vrata plakala.
I kad ljubav u tebi ne osećam,
Ne dam ja na tebe - MOJE.

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Moj si lom, moj si slom, moj si brodolom,
Ja u tebi sve sam našla.

Moj si, moj savršen greh, neću, ne želim da stanem,
Ja bih da zagrlim te, a ti bi da odeš odavde.
Moj si, moj melek, moj bol!
Kako da pomerim s’ tobom kraj?
U oči dok gledam te sad, k’o dete u porušen grad...

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Boli kad zaplače u meni ta devojčica, što voli te, voli te, voli te...

Copying, re-uploading and illegally distributing this copyrighted work is strictly prohibited! ©

LYRICS:
Svaki sat, svaki sprat ja sam brojala,
Noćima ispred tvojih vrata plakala.
I kad ljubav u tebi ne osećam,
Ne dam ja na tebe - MOJE.

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Moj si lom, moj si slom, moj si brodolom,
Ja u tebi sve sam našla.

Moj si, moj savršen greh, neću, ne želim da stanem,
Ja bih da zagrlim te, a ti bi da odeš odavde.
Moj si, moj melek, moj bol!
Kako da pomerim s’ tobom kraj?
U oči dok gledam te sad, k’o dete u porušen grad...

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Boli kad zaplače u meni ta devojčica, što voli te, voli te, voli te...

Hvala:

Snježana Jerković Radočaj
snjezana@jrprodukcija.hr 
+385 98 1331122


TEKST “ HRAM”

Ostavio sam svoje dane u noći, 
Pa na sebe još sam ljut; 
I pogledam u mrak, ko u tvoje oči, 
U taj praznik prekinut.. 
Još me hrani nada da me pamtiš, 
Da sam ti sve, 
Ljubav nije uzmeš pa je vratiš 
Boli me... 

Tvoja ljubav je hram ljubavi 
I kad lomi se nebo ti zlato i srebro si, 
Hram ljubavi, 
Pobeda nam je predaja, zauvek duše su nam ogledala 
Ne veruj ni reč samo srca znaju 
Kad od želje gube dah; 
Ova ljubav je počela na kraju, 
Al imam snage za taj strah..

snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: ULIČNI SVIRAČ SE OPROSTIO OD BALAŠEVIĆA: Poslušajte pesmu zbog koje se svi prolaznici naježe
snippet.description:
Ulični svirač Zoran koji Novosađane uglavnom uveseljava svojom muzikom i izvedbom na gitari, ove noće napravio je izuzetak i oprostio se od novosadskog mornara - Đorđa Balaševića. Zoran je imao priliku da upozna Balaševića, a ovom prilikom je konstatovao da je njegov odlazak veliki gubitak za Novi Sad.

#đorđeBalašević #uličniSvirač #noviSad #kurir #kurirTelevizija

snippet.title: PRAVILA IGRE - JEDINA (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Pravila Igre - Jedina // Gema Produkcija 2021.
Zabranjeno kopiranje! Svaka neovlaštena kopija bit će uklonjena!

Ivan Penezić, pjevač grupe Pravila Igre, podijelio je sjećanja na svoju najveću i najvažniju ljubavnu priču dosad. Vratio se na početak ljubavi sa Sarom Lizatović, samozatajnom djevojkom iz Zagreba, s kojom je dijelio ljubavne početke od malih nogu. Njihov se ljubavni roman proteže kroz čitavu mladost, uz dobre i pokoji loš trenutak, ali prožet brojnim osjećajima, rekao je Ivan. „Kako se desi da ti važno nije ono što je sveto bilo nekad prije“, prisjetio se u nastavku i ispričao kako ga je, nakon zaruka na Valentinovo, njegova djevojka ostavila – ni manje, ni više – pred oltarom te tako ostavila gorak okus prisjećanja na Dan zaljubljenih.

Upravo je ovo priča koju nam je otpjevao za klavirom, u novome spotu grupe Pravila Igre za pjesmu Jedina. Pjesma koja svojom glazbom i tekstom budi posebne emocije te daje naslutiti da je riječ o novome hitu u ovo doba godine. Nakon višestrukih glazbenih uspješnica, Pravila Igre ponovno povisuju ljestvicu te svojim novim glazbenim uratkom daju naslutiti da nas u 2021. godini očekuje niz njihovih glazbenih iznenađenja.

„Teško je opisati koliko nam je svaka pjesma posebna dok je stvaramo, ali zaista je tako – svaka od njih ostavlja svojevrsni upečatljivi trag u našoj karijeri. Pjesma 'Jedina' također je među našim omiljenim djelima, i čvrsto vjerujemo da će pronaći svoje mjesto u srcima naših slušatelja. Ona je posebna, emotivna, karakterna, i upravo to smo nastojali potkrijepiti pričom u glazbenom video spotu. Nadamo se da ćete uživati kao što smo i mi uživali stvarajući ju!“, izjavili su dečki iz Pravila Igre.

Pjesma Jedina započinje niz od planirana 4 singla u ovoj godini, a dečki kažu kako će, u skladu s nadolazećim okolnostima, spremno odraditi barem nekoliko (virtualnih) nastupa za svoje vjerne obožavatelje. Cjelokupnu podršku pružaju im i supružnici Buljan, autori i tzv. „hitmejkeri“ koji vjerno stoje iza svih njihovih glazbenih uspješnica.

TEKST:
------------------
Noćas plaši jače
tišina nego prije.
K'o dva stranca mi smo,
ništa isto nije.
Udara u grudi
pogled tvoj sa strane.
Od ljubavi znam samo
ostat' će mi rane.

Tako si daleka,
a dijeli nas tek sjena.
Mogao bi s tobom
bit' za sva vremena.
Kako li se desi
da ti važno nije?
Ono što je sveto 
bilo nekad prije.

Jedina, Jedina,
nije srce stijena hladna ledena.
I nije Bog dao da,
da još ne'ko voli
kao tebe ja.

Jedina ako te
ne'ko kao i ti meni ostavi,
bit' ću taj što čeka te.
Nek' nas naše tuge opet sastave,
nek' nas naše tuge opet sastave.

Naslonio sam glavu
na krilo samoći.
Ja i ona sami
u ovoj pustoj noći.
Kako li se desi
da ti važno nije?
Ono što je sveto 
bilo nekad prije.

Jedina, Jedina,
nije srce stijena hladna, ledena.
I nije Bog dao da,
da još ne'ko voli
kao tebe ja.
Jedina ako te,
ne'ko kao i ti meni ostavi,
bit' ću taj što čeka te.
Nek' nas naše tuge opet sastave,
nek' nas naše tuge opet sastave.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Krankšvester - Nova Zaraza (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Glazba: H. Marjanović - Sett (https://instagram.com/sett3000?igshid=1i4pzrdlbr63)
Tekst: Davor Miletić - 3ki Stil (https://instagram.com/3ki_stil?igshid=x8p0q2gig300)/ H. Marjanović - Sett 
Refren: Sis L
Aranžman: H. Marjanović - Sett
Mix i Master: Hrvoje Marjanović - Sett

VIDEO: 
Produkcija : Red Eye View (https://instagram.com/redeyeviewprod?igshid=dhyvc9dqwlub)
Režija : Marko Dalić (https://instagram.com/marko.s.dalic?igshid=1b0w6jm9kc1oh), Tomislav Dugandžić & Krankšvester (https://instagram.com/kranksvester_official?igshid=1tfsc10ze4ha3)
Montaža i Vizualni Efekti : Tomislav Dugandžić (https://instagram.com/tomredrum?igshid=co46rnn7fxoz)

BOOKING: zvone.pusic@gmail.com

Posebna zahvala ekipi koja je sudjelovala u stvaranjiu Nove Zaraze:
Sis L, Wana Kiiru (https://instagram.com/kiiruliiru?igshid=14lgsdlnzezca) i Senad Galijašević (Senna M)

Follow: 
Yem (https://instagram.com/yemhr?igshid=1labgfcrlf4nv)
Approved Shop (https://instagram.com/approved_shop?igshid=1a2a3jgok593n)

TEKST:
(Sis L)
Nova zaraza se širi!

(3ki Stil)
Digla si me s dna, sa tobom znam tko sam
Ostavljaš na meni trag ko bijelo ispod nosa
Dala si mi snagu zato šaljem ove pusice
Snagu kojom mogu isčupat rep konju iz guzice
Od ljubavi se živi, na poslu dat ću otkaz
Reć' ću svome šefu nek si nađe novog konja
Na fejsu si me dodala, otad si mi odana
Ti me ne bi nikad za drugi kurac prodala
Reko sam si Davore oduzet ćeš si život
A onda si mi prišla i počastila me pivom
Možda sam jedinac al u tebi vidim sestru
Bit će da zbog toga ja ne razmišljam o sexu
I majka mi je rekla da u tebi vidi snahu
Obeć'o sam ženi da ću je pretvoriti u baku
Neka misle da sam lud ali vjerujem u čuda
Neka cjepivo za krizu bude jebanje u šupak!

(Sis L)
Nova zaraza se širi, u trbuhu leptirići
Samo me ljubi i zažmiri, pusti da nas ljubav izliječi (2X)

(Sett)
Tvoja me je ljubav bebo podigla iz groba
Na krilima od sreće letim iznad smoga
Letim iznad planina, šuma, elektrana
Zbog tvoje slatke ljubavi letim kao vrana
Letim kao pilot, veza mi je kokpit
Ak me srećo ostaviš ja ću ti se roknit
Blaka blaka i više me nema
Sjeti me se kad procvate prva krizantema
Ja bez tebe nemam razloga da živim
Nemam čemu da se divim mačko
Tvoja ljubav diže me sa poda
Ko žednoga voda, Skywalkera Yoda
Znači zbog tebe sam jači
Tvoja ljubav je Bugatti, tvoja ljubav je Versace
Kad god poželiš moje tijelo, imaš ga
Uvijek ću ti dat, bebo primaj ga u pičku!

(Sis L)
Nova zaraza se širi, u trbuhu leptirići
Samo me ljubi i zažmiri, pusti da nas ljubav izliječi (2X)

(Sis L)
Ne mogu nam ništa vodene kozice
Španjolska gripa ni velike boginje
Pusti samo neka ljubav vodi te
Reci volim te (2X)

(Sis L)
Nova zaraza se širi, u trbuhu leptirići
Samo me ljubi i zažmiri, pusti da nas ljubav izliječi (2X)

snippet.title: MATIJA CVEK - Ptice (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Matija Cvek - Ptice
🎧 SLUŠAJ/STREAM/DOWNLOAD: https://backl.ink/144142284 

Glazba: Matija Cvek / Alan Dović 
Tekst: Matija Cvek
Produkcija / aranžman: Alan Dović

FOLLOW:

✅ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/matijacvek/... 

Redatelj: Luka Sepčić
Direktor fotografije: Mateo Jurčić
Montaža: Luka Sepčić
Kolor: Luka Sepčić
Majstor rasvjete: Filip Šarić
Rasvjetljivač: Zvonimir Murković
 
Scenograf: Ana Badurina
MUA & hair: Lea Kordić Gružić
Model: Ivana Jurić
 
Izvršni producent: Ana Badurina
Asistent produkcije: Sara Horvatić
Produkcija: SESTRICE
 
Klavir: Marko Dundović 
Gitara, synth: Alan Dović 
Bas: Martin Petračić 
Bubanj: Janko Novoselić 
Back vokali: Matija Cvek 
Mix: Alan Dović 
Master: Dragutin Smokrović
 
Hvala svima koji su doprinijeli na setu i u stvaranju ove priče.
 
Booking i management: Mia Milovčić 
Kontakt: mia.milovcic@gmail.com 
Mob. 091/3434361

*Tekst*
 
Istina kao ružan san dolazi kad sklopim oci,
na prstima i kupa sjene u samoći.
Razgovaram, tim sjenama se tiho klanjam, 
uz novi krug pitanja. 
 
Pjevaju li ptice kad ti zatreba stih ?
Vjeruj mi da mogu ja bih umjesto njih.
Čuvaju li kazaljke nas jutarnji mir ?
Odgovora nema gorko mirim se s tim...mirim se s tim. 
 
Ako stvorim je tu, sve drugo bit će mi lako.
Ako stvorim je tu, kraj sebe bar na kratko.
Dozivam ju, da u sjećanju ostane...ostane tu. 
 
Spavaj, sanjaj
ja čuvat ću stražu,
a ako suze te pronađu 
javi 
 
Pjevaju li ptice kad ti zatreba stih ?
Vjeruj mi da mogu ja bih umjesto njih.
Čuvaju li kazaljke nas jutarnji mir ?
Odgovora nema gorko mirim se s tim...mirim se s tim. 
 
Ako stvorim je tu, sve drugo bit će mi lako.
Ako stvorim je tu, kraj sebe bar na kratko.
Dozivam ju, da u sjećanju ostane...ostane tu.

#matijacvek #ptice #popmusic
****
(P) & (C) Menart 2021
http://www.menart.hr/
Pretplati se: https://bit.ly/2XLojVF

Gitara, synth: Alan Dović 
Bas: Martin Petračić 
Bubanj: Janko Novoselić 
Back vokali: Matija Cvek 
Mix: Alan Dović 
Master: Dragutin Smokrović
 
Hvala svima koji su doprinijeli na setu i u stvaranju ove priče.
 
Booking i management: Mia Milovčić 
Kontakt: mia.milovcic@gmail.com 
Mob. 091/3434361

*Tekst*
 
Istina kao ružan san dolazi kad sklopim oci,
na prstima i kupa sjene u samoći.
Razgovaram, tim sjenama se tiho klanjam, 
uz novi krug pitanja. 
 
Pjevaju li ptice kad ti zatreba stih ?
Vjeruj mi da mogu ja bih umjesto njih.
Čuvaju li kazaljke nas jutarnji mir ?
Odgovora nema gorko mirim se s tim...mirim se s tim. 
 
Ako stvorim je tu, sve drugo bit će mi lako.
Ako stvorim je tu, kraj sebe bar na kratko.
Dozivam ju, da u sjećanju ostane...ostane tu. 
 
Spavaj, sanjaj
ja čuvat ću stražu,
a ako suze te pronađu 
javi 
 
Pjevaju li ptice kad ti zatreba stih ?
Vjeruj mi da mogu ja bih umjesto njih.
Čuvaju li kazaljke nas jutarnji mir ?
Odgovora nema gorko mirim se s tim...mirim se s tim. 
 
Ako stvorim je tu, sve drugo bit će mi lako.
Ako stvorim je tu, kraj sebe bar na kratko.
Dozivam ju, da u sjećanju ostane...ostane tu.

#matijacvek #ptice #popmusic
****
(P) & (C) Menart 2021
http://www.menart.hr/

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASA’s Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.

snippet.title: MARE LUDA - TONCI HULJIC & MADRE BADESSA (OFFICIAL VIDEO 2021) HD
snippet.description:
Follow Tonči Huljić & Madre Badessa: 
http://www.toncihuljic.com
http://www.instagram.com/toncihuljic_official
http://www.facebook.com/TonciHuljic.MadreBadessa

Subscribe to Tonči & Madre Badessa: http://bit.ly/TonciHuljicMBYT

Premijera spota i pjesme "MARE LUDA".

Glazba: Tonči Huljić
Tekst: Vjekoslava Huljić
Aranžman: Tonči Huljić i Leo Škaro
Mix: Leo Škaro
Master: Goran Martinac

Download:
Apple Music - http://bit.ly/MareLuda-AppleMusic
Amazon - http://bit.ly/MareLuda-Amazon

Listen:
Spotify - http://bit.ly/MareLuda-Spotify
Deezer - http://bit.ly/MareLuda-Deezer

Produkcija: Pilot Studio 2021
Scenarij: Tonči Huljić
Režija: Vojan Koceić
Snimatelj: Bruno Bilonić
Stilist: Silvia Dvornik
Montaža / Kolor: Vojan Koceić
Glumci: Meri Kolić, Uršula Najev, Luka Čerjan, Denis Kalajžić
Hvala: HNK Split, Tihomir Marjanović

© Tonci Huljic & Madre Badessa - Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimke i postavljanje na druge kanale!

Inamora se duša samo jednon,
a maća miljun puti sva...
Nima sapuna da je opere,
ni šalbuna, sode kauštike,
kad je jubav satare...

Mare je isto jubila,
bila je kontra fameja...
Ka Romeo i Julija,
al se nije ubila, 
bidna je poludila...

A Mare luda smije se...
I sedan banki prošla je...
Nije ka siromaji
na kontejneru u nevoji,
bidna kopa ta zbog jubavi...

A Mare luda smije se,
ni ćeri, sina, fameje...
Po škovacama kopa ta,
ka i dite nedužna,
lipog lica svetica...

#TonciHuljic #MadreBadessa #MareLuda

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32’ to tie at one and added two more in the 65’ and 85’. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70’ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27’ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Life found beneath Antarctic ice sheet 'shouldn't be there'
snippet.description:
Biologists say the inadvertent discovery of sea life on a boulder underneath an Antarctic ice shelf and hundreds of kilometres challenges our understanding of how far organisms can live from sunlight.

A British Antarctic Survey team drilled through the 900-metre-thick Filchner-Ronne Ice Shelf and dropped a camera down the hole in search of mud on the seabed. To their surprise, the camera revealed a boulder ringed by animals. Video footage appear to show 16 sponges, accompanied by 22 unidentified animals which could include barnacles. It is the first time such immobile life has been found beneath an Antarctic ice sheet.  “There’s all sorts of reasons they shouldn’t be there,” says Huw Griffiths at the British Antarctic Survey, who analysed the footage.

Read more: https://www.newscientist.com/article/2267737-life-found-beneath-antarctic-ice-sheet-shouldnt-be-there/

snippet.title: Диана се кладила у свој телефон | Не коцкајте личне ствари!
snippet.description:
Дианини родитељи недавно су јој купили нови телефон, али једна девојчица у школи има супротно: изгубила је телефон, а родитељи су рекли да је више неће купити. Шта ће лукава девојка? Зашто Диана плаче? Погледајте у овој серији!
Још један видео:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QKjY1-H-0pw
Претплатите се на канал!👩‍👩‍👦‍👦 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
Не заборавите на звоно!🔔🔔🔔
Хвала на вашим свиђањима!❤️❤️❤️

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - We're Good (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
The official music video for Dua Lipa - We're Good

Stream We’re Good: https://dualipa.co/WereGood

Taken from the Moonlight Edition of Dua Lipa's second studio album 'Future Nostalgia' released in 2020, which featured the hit singles 'Don't Start Now', 'Physical', 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' & 'Levitating'

Get the album Future Nostalgia (The Moonlight Edition): https://dualipa.co/FN-MoonlightEdition

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-KZfRV8c13fOCkhXdLiQ?sub_confirmation=1

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaoXT_LJuwEyESQlctWNDCwD

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaouNABcO_A9Xkn_Nkz0PT11

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube

Directed by Vania Heymann and Gal Muggia
Produced by Iconoclast
Executive Producer: Natan Schottenfels
Director of Photography: Marcell Rev and Santiago Gonzalez
VFX by: Vania Heymann and Tal Baltuch
Color & Title Design: Tal Baltuch
3D Production: Yambo Studio
Rig & Lobster Animation: David Beran
Lighting & Shading: Yambo, Nemanja Ivanovic
Additional VFX: Cinnamon vfx
Sound Design: Shlomi Attias
Storyboard: Maayan Shinar
Edited by: Gal Muggia and Vania Heymann
Choreographer: Charm La’Donna
Assistant Choreographer: Alex Clark
Commissioner: Katie Dolan
Director rep: Hands London

Production Service NY: Walter Pictures
EP Walter: Lia Mayer-Sommer
Line Producer NY: Courtenay Johnson
Production Service Kiev: Shelter.film
EP Shelter: Albert Zurashvili
Line Producer Kiev: Daria Stepani
2nd unit DP: Denys Lushchyk
Art Director Shelter: Misha Levchenko, Aleksey Velichko, Vlad Tymchenko

Dua Lipa Team-
Stylist: Lorenzo Posocco
Stylist Assistant: Juan Zenon
Make Up: Samantha Lau
Hair: Anna Cofone
Tailor: Luis Cascante
BTS: Bryan Berrios, Tyrell Hampton
Dua’s Assistant: Nawal Alkhedairy
Transportation: Larry Vesquez

Lyrics:
I’m on an island
Even when you’re close
Can’t take the silence
I’d rather be alone
I think it’s pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It’s time I wave goodbye from the window
Let’s end this like we should and say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

No need to hide it 
Go get what you want
This won’t be a burden if we both don’t hold a grudge
I think it’s pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It’s time I wave goodbye from the window
Let’s end this like we should and say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

Now you’re holding this against me
Like I knew you would
I tried my best to make this easy
So don’t give me that look just say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: Диана учи девојчице како да привуку пажњу дечака! | Каприциозно даме |  Диана схов
snippet.description:
Девојчице у школи имају проблема са дечацима. Једноставно не могу да им привуку пажњу. Диана зна како да помогне девојчицама и дала им је савете како да привуку пажњу дечака. Али нешто је пошло по злу, Дијанин савет не иде! Шта ће девојчице? А зашто Дијанин савет не делује? Погледајте у овој серији!

hr.description:

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: 'Very rare': Aviation expert John Nance describes engine failure on Boeing 777-200 near Denver
snippet.description:
Shocking video shows an engine of a Boeing 777-200 in flames while in the air. United Airlines Flight 328 was on its way from Denver to Honolulu on Saturday when an engine failed shortly after takeoff. 

The plane was able to land safely back in Denver and no one on board or on the ground was injured. The National Transportation Safety Board is investigating. https://www.king5.com/article/tech/science/aerospace/very-rare-aviation-expert-john-nance-describes-engine-failure-on-boeing-777-200-near-denver/281-dae9a0c4-e4a2-423c-b0c1-e1c6911ce5c9

snippet.title: Vladika Porfirije pjeva četničke pjesme
snippet.description:
Novi patrijarh SPC-a Porfirije, do danas mitropolit zagrebačko-ljubljanski osvanuo je prije pet godina na video snimku, kako u zanimljivom društvu pjeva četničku pjesmu posvećenu četničkom vojvodi Momčilu Đujiću, ratnom zločincu iz Drugog svjetskog rata.

Snimak je navodno nastao prije pet godina u Chicagu.

- Nakon liturgije bio je ručak i zabava, rekao sam Voji Bilbiji da otpjeva "našu pjesmu", misleći na "Tamo daleko". On je počeo pjevati pjesmu koju i ne znam i nekako sam pjevušio za njima, malo iznenađen što nije zapjevao onu koju sam mislio, pa sam u jednom trenutku i zašutio - pravdao se Porfirije u hrvatskim medijima rekavši da je zašutio kada se pjevalo o "kokardi vojvode Đujića".

Iz snimke se jasno vidi da je Perić velik dio pjesme zaista opjevao, a već od početka same pjesme jasno je da se radi o pjesmi ratne tematike s obzirom da se spominju "mitraljesci" i "granate".

- Šta se ono na Dinari sjaji, Đujićeva kokarda na glavi - kaže sporni stih, a teško je procijeniti je li Porfirije zaista, kako tvrdi, prestao pjevati.

Pop Momčilo Đujić četnički je vojvoda i ratni zločinac odgovoran za neke od najgnusnijih zločina na ovim područjima u Drugom svjetskom ratu. Đujićevi četnici jedan od najvećih pokolja napravili su u selu Gata u zaleđu Omiša kada su 1.oktobra 1942. godine zvjerski poklali 95 civila.
tags: Šta se ono na Dinari sjaji
Serbian Orthodox priests singing a song of a Serbian fascist movement

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:

snippet.title: IZAŠAO JE IZ PODZEMLJA SA PRIČAMA OD KOJIH STAJE DAH Nebojša Tubić Žabac u Sceniranju 07.02.2021.
snippet.description:
Kontroverzni biznismen Nebojša Tubić Žabac ovonedeljni je gost emisiji "Sceniranje" na Kurir televiziji. 
Žabac je poznat kao čovek sa beogradskog asfalta, jedan je od poslednjih preživelih aktera mračnih devedesetih godina. On je poznavao gotovo sve ljude čija su se imena u to vreme povezivala sa podzemljem.
Pre devet godina greškom je upucan u jednom lokalu u Novom Sadu, ali je preživeo i kao takav ušao u Ginisovu knjigu rekorda.

#žabac #nebojšaTubić #podzemlje #mafija #kriminal #zemun #klan #ginis #estrada #beograd #kurir #kurirTelevizija #sceniranje

snippet.title: Emanet 120. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 120 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. snippet.title: Jovana Jeremić na "Blic poligrafu": "On mi je umro na rukama, gledao me je pravo u oči"
snippet.description:
U ovonedeljnom "Blic poligrafu" voditeljka i novinarka Jovana Jeremić odgovarala je na na brojna pitanja koja se tiču njenog poslovnog i privatnog života.
Kako se Jovana snašla u vrućoj stolici poligrafa i na koja pitanja je slagala saznajte u novoj epizodi "Blic poligrafa", koja je pred vama.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt 

7:20 — Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 — Tasty gummy bear lollies
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

Pretplatite se na naš kanal, stisnite zvono i ne propustite niti jedan video: http://bit.ly/24sata_subscribe 
Pretplatite se i na JoomBoos kanal: http://bit.ly/joomboos_subscribe
Pretplatite se i na Miss7 kanal: https://bit.ly/Miss7_Subscribe

Pratite nas i drugdje:
Web: http://bit.ly/24sata_WEB
Facebook: http://bit.ly/24sata_FB
Instagram: http://bit.ly/24sata_IG
Twitter: http://bit.ly/24sata_TW
Kontakt: reporter@24sata.hr

Mi smo 24 sata - vodeća medijska kuća u Hrvatskoj.

Urednica i voditeljica projekta video magazini: Anela Kuburaš - http://bit.ly/AnelaKuburaš
Direktor videa, inovacijskih projekata i JoomBoosa: Matej Lončarić - http://bit.ly/MatejLončarić
Glavni urednik 24sata: Goran Gavranović

snippet.title: How to make KISSEL like babushka (кисель) - Russian Kissel cooking with Boris
snippet.description:
Goes well with syrnik: https://youtu.be/5zI4_hMYQEg
Similar to kompot: https://youtu.be/9bZk6wXCMCY
More cooking videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UKfmRhfuI8g&list=PLbS0HkS8Xsorrdr3pPk4lP80tUAzfyxP1

INGREDIENTS:
fresh, frozen or dried fruits and berries. Boris uses frozen strawberries and blackcurrants.
sugar
water
potato starch
for topping: milk, ice cream or whipped cream. or mayonnaise if Boris.

AMOUNTS:
For every cup (250ml) of berries add 2 cups (500ml) water.
Sugar amount depends on sweetness of berries, so try yourself. Usually 8-16 tablespoons needed.
For every 4 cups (1 liter) of water use 3 tablespoons (without heap) of starch.

Boris makes the legendary babushka recipe - Russian kissel. Very easy to make even on budget. This dessert is very easy to make even for beginner.

snippet.title: Na ANTARKTIKU Pronadjena Čudna Bića - Čudni Dokumenti Procureli Iz Kine (Svet 2021)
snippet.description:
Pogledajte Novi Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RncZySafr2s
Zapratite me na instagram: https://www.instagram.com/milnovic
Koristite Idiokratija emojije : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCaCRd1IGZVq-Upwkc51uLUQ/join

Predstavljam vam novu epizodu serijala svetski cudni bizarni dogadjaji. U ovom serijalu pricamo o nedavnim desavanjima, a u danasnjoj epizodi govorimo o nedavnoj vesti u kojima stoji da su naucnici pronasli cudna bica skoro kilometar ispod leda. Pricamo dalje o bizarnim procurelim prezentacijama koji sugerisu da Kina pravi nekakav bizarni tajni projekat. Istrazujemo da li je to zaista istina, spominjao sam i dan zaljubljeni kao i jos neke nedavne dogadjaje.

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/milnovic
Fb stranica : https://www.facebook.com/Idiokratija
Drugi Kanal : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCONxY_-Ql0nhq9GGrDILBKA

snippet.title: Mission Control Live: NASA Lands Perseverance Mars Rover (360 video)
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. Watch here for a 360-degree engineer's-eye-view from inside Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory, with picture-in-picture commentary.

To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.

Please note: Not all browsers support viewing 360 videos. YouTube supports their playback on computers using Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Opera browsers. For best experience on a mobile device, play this video in the YouTube app. 2-D video available at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ

Credit: NASA-JPL/Caltech

snippet.title: Bosanac kupio pravi vlak u voznom stanju
snippet.description:
Mladen Cvitanović iz Golubinja kod Žepča svjetski je putnik. Bio je najmlađi vojnik Vijetnamskog rata, radio na naftnim platformama, boksao u Norveškoj i pobijedio 94 puta. Doživio je desetak poraza. Njegov djed je bio željezničar i u spomen na njega kupio je prvo parnu lokomotivu iz Željezare Zenica u ispravnom stanju a onda i dva vagona od hrvatskih željeznica. Mladen svako jutro trči osam kilometara. Ima svoju teretanu gdje vježba a proizvodi i domaća jaja koja prodaje trgovinama i seljacima koji ne žele uzgajati koke. Mladenova namjera je obnoviti Titov plavi voz koji će biti turistička atrakcija u Centralnoj Bosni, odnosno BiH. Završio je i projekt željezničke stanice a od jeseni za turiste će biti na raspolaganju i jedan helikopter za obilazak poznatih turističkih destinacija. Mladen je u vojsci vozio ne samo helikoptere nego i avione. Svjetski putnik iz Žepča ima oko 65 godina ali i toliko ideja kao da mu je 35 godina. Pogledajte ovu neobičnu priču iz Golubinje kod Žepča.
Pridružite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

en.title: Bosnian man bought a real train
en.description: Mladen Cvitanović from Golubinje, near Žepče, is a world traveler. He was the youngest Vietnam War soldier, worked on oil rigs, boxed in Norway, and won 94 times. He suffered a dozen defeats. His grandfather was a railway worker and in his memory he first bought a steam locomotive from the Zenica Ironworks in good condition, and then two wagons from the Croatian Railways. Mladen runs eight kilometres every morning. It has its own gym where it exercises and also produces homemade eggs which it sells to shops and farmers who do not want to grow chickens. Mladen's intention is to restore Tito's blue train, which will be a tourist attraction in Central Bosnia, ie BiH. The project of the railway station has also been completed, and from the autumn, a helicopter will be available for tourists to tour well-known tourist destinations. Mladen drove, not only helicopters, but also planes in the army. The world traveler from Žepče is about 65 years old, but he has as many ideas as if he were 35 years old. Take a look at this unusual story from Golubinja near Žepče.

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Marija Stojaković - Dolazi vreme novog svetskog poretka, svet neće biti isti! (20.2.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bila je Marija Stojaković, vokalna umetnica, pedagog i borac protiv novog svetskog poretka. Nakon nekoliko godina života u Australiji odlučila je da se vrati u Srbiju, ostavivši posao u čuvenoj Sidnejskoj operi. Razlog povratka je, kako kaže, otrežnjenje koje je usledilo nakon što je videla užasnu stranu propagande. Rešena da se bori da ceo svet čuje istinu o pravoj nameri onih koji manipulišu svetom, u svojim nastupima govori otvoreno o temama koje mnogi ne smeju ni da pomenu. Preporučujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate više o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 16.02.2021. godine u našim prostorijama, u Beogradu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar Pavković.

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i žele da pomognu rad naše produkcije to mogu učiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudićemo se da ostanemo dosledni našoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i širenju istine bez cenzure.

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne žele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poštuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji čuvaju sećanje na naše slavne pretke.

snippet.title: OSIJEK vs RIJEKA 2:0 (22.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
Nogometaši Osijeka vratili su se pobjedama te su u 22. kolu HT Prve lige kao domaćini nadjačali Rijeku s 2:0.

Nakon po jedne vrlo dobre prilike s obje strane, Osijek je poveo u 25. minuti. Strijelac je bio Ramon Mierez. Osijek je djelovao bolje na terenu. Domaćin je bio konkretniji i organiziraniji, a nakon vodstva još je lakše kontrolirao situaciju.

Konačna odluka dogodila se u 70. minuti kada je vratar Rijeke Nevistić pogriješio, a poklon je iskoristio Mierez za svoj drugi pogodak. Inače, Argentinac je trenutačno na 14 ligaških golova i dijeli prvo mjesto ljestvice strijelaca s Lovrićem.

Osijek se tako oporavio nakon poraza u derbiju protiv Dinama. Rijeka je drugi put ove sezone gostovala u Osijeku i drugi put je izgubila (gol razlika 0:5). Isto tako, Rijeka je ostala na samo jednoj pobjedi u zadnjih sedam prvenstvenih nastupa.

HT Prva liga, 22. kolo: Osijek - Rijeka 2:0 (Mierez 25., 70.)

snippet.title: MARKO ŠKUGOR - KAP VODE (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Pratite Marka na društvenim mrežama:
https://www.instagram.com/markoskugor.official/
https://www.facebook.com/markoskugor.official

Pretplatite se na kanal:
http://bit.ly/MarkoŠkugorYT

Booking & management:
Hrvatska: +385 99 848 5374 / markoskugor.official@gmail.com                      
Slovenija i EU: +386 68 649 791 / info@finkram.si

MARKO ŠKUGOR - KAP VODE

Glazba: Marko Tomasović
Tekst: Josip Ralašić
Aranžman: Leo Škaro
Izdavač: Zvuci Mediterana

VIDEO PRODUKCIJA: Zupančič DESIGN Video

"KAP VODE"

Noćas dušu pred svima otvaram,
i cijelog sebe zauvijek tebi poklanjam.
Ovaj ples neka traje zauvijek,
tvoja je ljubav nemiru mom lijek.

Ref.
Moja si mirna luka na ovom moru nemira,   
A tvoja nježna ruka mom je srcu postelja.   
I na kraj svijeta, ako treba, ja sam spreman za tebe,
tvoja ljubav kap je vode usred pustinje.

Noćas si lijepa, najljepša od svih,
i sve riječi svijeta sad stanu mi u stih.
Al dovoljan je samo jedan pogled tih,
naša ljubav nije od običnih.

Zagrli me čvrsto, nikad ne puštaj,
sve dok dišem, dok mi sviće,
ova ljubav nema kraj. 

Kopiranje je zabranjeno, svaku neovlaštenu kopiju bit ćemo primorani ukloniti!

© Zvuci Mediterana, 2021.

snippet.title: BMW M5 v Audi RS6 v AMG E63 S - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

How’s this for an all-German showdown... Audi RS6 v BMW M5 Competition v Mercedes-AMG E63 S! 

All three of these contenders can produce a serious amount of power. First up we’ve got Mat in his RS6, which is powered by a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 and can put down 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him we have the new BMW M5 Competition, with a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 delivering 625hp and 750Nm. 

And then finally we have the AMG E63 S, which is housing a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which produces 612hp and 850Nm. 

So how do you think this will play out? The M5 puts down the most power, so will it snatch the win? Or will the Audi’s Quattro AWD prove a decisive on this wet track? There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

Check out Mat's saving on one of these cars - http://bit.ly/Mats-Choice-2002

snippet.title: HYPER Altcoin SUPER-CYCLE Coming (BTC Dominance Collapse 2021)
snippet.description:
I would love to tell you nobody saw this massive dip coming but once we blew past $54K for Bitcoin it was all but a certainty. One thing you can do now Is to start looking around at altcoins you wish you’d accumulated more of before the gigantic run-up. One thing’s for certain, buying altcoins at these prices will have MAJOR compound effects down the road. One thing to keep in mind is Bitcoin dominance controls this market. People have to start taking profits out of Bitcoin and put them into altcoins so they can run. It’s one of the most important metrics in all of crypto. 

Today I’m joined by Carl from The Moon to talk about something brewing that could be massive, leading to a hyper altcoin super cycle. We’ll talk all about crypto market cycles and examine the most relevant crypto charts. Find out if it’s about to be altcoin season.

Follow Carl ➡️ https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCc4Rz_T9Sb1w5rqqo9pL1Og

7:10 Conclusion on Altcoin season

snippet.title: Emanet 122. Bölüm | Legacy Episode 122
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Dirljiv oproštaj od Balaševića i na splitskom Peristilu
snippet.description:
#Peristil #Split #Balasevic
Brojni obožavatelji s tugom se opraštaju od legendarnog kantautora Đorđa Balaševića. Najemotivnije je u njegovu Novom Sadu gdje su mu, pjevajući njegove pjesme, počast odale stotine ljudi. Zastave su ondje spuštene na pola koplja.

Paljenjem svijeća i pjevanjem njegovih pjesama, od Đoleta, kako ga od milja zovu, opraštaju se i obožavatelji diljem Hrvatske. Od legendardnog glazbenika oprostili su se brojni građani i na splitskom Peristilu.

HRTi: https://hrti.hrt.hr/home
HRT web portal: https://www.hrt.hr/
HRT FB: https://www.facebook.com/HRTnovimediji/

snippet.title: Emanet 124. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 124 Promo
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: 10 minuta za bolju planetu 🌍
snippet.description:
Ćao dragi ljudi i dobro došli nazad na moj youtube kanal. Nadam se da ste mi dobro, da vam je ova godina počela najbolje moguće i da ste sa puno elana krenuli u nove pobede☺️ U današnjem videu vam govorim o 10 basic saveta koje svako od nas može da primeni, a koji sigurno prave razliku. Ja vas molim da budete pozitivni oko ovih stvari, da ne zameramo jedni drugima već da nam fokus bude na medjusobnoj edukaciji. Imamo jednu planetu na kojoj živimo, i smatram da svako sa sobom nosi određenu dozu odgovornosti prema istoj. Svakako se nadam da ćemo u budućnosti imati mnogo više mogućnosti da doprinesemo zaštiti i očuvanju životne sredine. 
* video je uradjen u saradnji sa dm Srbija.

localized.description:
Ćao dragi ljudi i dobro došli nazad na moj youtube kanal. Nadam se da ste mi dobro, da vam je ova godina počela najbolje moguće i da ste sa puno elana krenuli u nove pobede☺️ U današnjem videu vam govorim o 10 basic saveta koje svako od nas može da primeni, a koji sigurno prave razliku. Ja vas molim da budete pozitivni oko ovih stvari, da ne zameramo jedni drugima već da nam fokus bude na medjusobnoj edukaciji. Imamo jednu planetu na kojoj živimo, i smatram da svako sa sobom nosi određenu dozu odgovornosti prema istoj. Svakako se nadam da ćemo u budućnosti imati mnogo više mogućnosti da doprinesemo zaštiti i očuvanju životne sredine. 
* video je uradjen u saradnji sa dm Srbija.

snippet.title: Salata SEDMO NEBO: Ovako je pravim već godinama i nikog nije ostavila ravnodušnim
snippet.description:
Salata SEDMO NEBO je jedna od mojih omiljenih salata sa testeninom. Sastoji se od dosta povrća a jogurt joj daje predivan osvežavajući ukus. Ova salata sa testeninom se pravi jako brzo i jednostavno a odlična je i kao prilog glavnom jelu a i kao obrok salata. 
● SASTOJCI ●
400 gr testenine Mattini
1 glavica ljubičastog luka (može i crni)
1-2 čen belog luka
1 šargarepa
3-4 kisela krastavčića
kafena šoljica kukuruza šećerca
1 čaša jogurta od 180 gr
so
150-200 gr feta sira
2 kuvana jajeta
peršun
slatka začinska paprika
#salata #recepti

sk.title: Šalát s príchuťou raja - šalát s makarónmi
sk.description:
Šalát SEDEM NEBESKÝCH je jedným z mojich obľúbených cestovinových šalátov. Skladá sa z množstva zeleniny a jogurt mu dodáva úžasnú osviežujúcu chuť. Tento šalát s cestovinami sa pripravuje veľmi rýchlo a ľahko a je vynikajúci ako príloha k hlavnému jedlu aj ako šalátové jedlo.
ZLOŽKY
400 g cestovín Mattini
1 hlávka fialovej cibule (môže byť aj čierna)
1-2 strúčiky cesnaku
1 mrkva
3-4 kyslé uhorky
šálka sladkej kukurice
1 šálka jogurtu so 180 gr
tak
150 - 200 g syra feta
2 varené vajcia
najprv
sladké korenené korenie
# šalát # recepty

sv.title: Paradissmaksatt sallad - sallad med makaroner
sv.description:
Den sjunde himlen är en av mina favorit pastasallader. Den består av mycket grönsaker och yoghurt ger den en underbar uppfriskande smak. Denna sallad med pasta görs mycket snabbt och enkelt och är utmärkt som tillbehör till huvudrätten och som salladsmåltid.
INGREDIENSER
400 g pasta Mattini
1 huvud lila lök (kan också vara svart)
1-2 vitlöksklyftor
1 morot
3-4 pickles
en kopp sockermajs
1 kopp yoghurt på 180 gr
så
150-200 g fetaost
2 kokta ägg
först
söt kryddig peppar
#sallad #recept

it.title: Non mi stanco mai di mangiare questa insalata
it.description:
L'insalata del SETTIMO CIELO è una delle mie insalate di pasta preferite. Consiste di molte verdure e yogurt gli conferisce un meraviglioso gusto rinfrescante. Questa insalata di pasta si prepara molto velocemente e facilmente ed è ottima come contorno ai primi piatti e come insalate.
INGREDIENTI
400 g di pasta Mattini
1 testa di cipolla viola (può anche essere nera)
1-2 spicchi d'aglio
1 carota
3-4 sottaceti
una tazza di mais dolce
1 tazza di yogurt da 180 gr
così
150-200 g di formaggio feta
2 uova sode
primo
peperone piccante dolce
#insalata #ricette

de.title: Salat mit Paradiesgeschmack
de.description:
Der SEVENTH HEAVEN-Salat ist einer meiner Lieblingsnudelsalate. Es besteht aus viel Gemüse und Joghurt verleiht ihm einen wunderbaren erfrischenden Geschmack. Dieser Salat mit Nudeln wird sehr schnell und einfach zubereitet und eignet sich hervorragend als Beilage zum Hauptgericht und als Salatmahlzeit.
ZUTATEN
400 g Pasta Mattini
1 Kopf lila Zwiebel (kann auch schwarz sein)
1-2 Knoblauchzehen
1 Karotte
3-4 Gurken
eine Tasse Zuckermais
1 Tasse Joghurt von 180 gr
so
150-200 g Feta
2 gekochte Eier
zuerst
süßer würziger Pfeffer
#salad #recipes

fi.title: Paratiisimaustettu salaatti - salaatti makaroneilla
fi.description:
SEEVENTH HEAVEN -salaatti on yksi suosikkini pastasalaateistani. Se koostuu paljon vihanneksista ja jogurtti antaa sille ihanan virkistävän maun. Tämä pastasalaatti valmistetaan erittäin nopeasti ja helposti ja on erinomainen pääruoan lisukkeeksi ja salaatti-ateriaksi.
AINESOSAT
400 g pastaa Mattini
1 pää purppuraa (voi olla myös mustaa)
1-2 valkosipulinkynttä
1 porkkana
3-4 suolakurkkua
kuppi sokerimaissia
1 kuppi jogurttia 180 g
niin
150-200 g fetajuustoa
2 keitettyä munaa
ensimmäinen
makea mausteinen pippuri
#salaatti #reseptit

fr.title: Je ne me lasse jamais de manger cette salade
fr.description:
La salade SEVENTH HEAVEN est l'une de mes salades de pâtes préférées. Il se compose de beaucoup de légumes et de yaourt lui donne un merveilleux goût rafraîchissant. Cette salade aux pâtes se prépare très rapidement et facilement et est excellente en accompagnement du plat principal et en salade.
INGRÉDIENTS
400 g de pâtes Mattini
1 tête d'oignon violet (peut aussi être noir)
1-2 gousses d'ail
1 carotte
3-4 cornichons
une tasse de maïs sucré
1 tasse de yaourt de 180 gr
alors
150-200 g de fromage feta
2 œufs durs
première
poivre doux épicé
#salade #recettes

no.title: Paradis-smaksatt salat - salat med makaroni
no.description:
SYVEN HIMLEN salat er en av mine favoritt pastasalater. Den består av mye grønnsaker og yoghurt gir den en fantastisk forfriskende smak. Denne salaten med pasta lages veldig raskt og enkelt og er utmerket som tilbehør til hovedretten og som et salatmåltid.
BESTANDDELER
400 g pasta Mattini
1 hode lilla løk (kan også være svart)
1-2 fedd hvitløk
1 gulrot
3-4 sylteagurk
en kopp søt mais
1 kopp yoghurt på 180 gr
så
150-200 g fetaost
2 kokte egg
først
søt krydret pepper
#salat # oppskrifter

es.title: Ensalada con sabor al paraíso - ensalada con macarrones
es.description:
La ensalada SEVENTH HEAVEN es una de mis ensaladas de pasta favoritas. Se compone de muchas verduras y el yogur le da un maravilloso sabor refrescante. Esta ensalada con pasta se prepara de manera muy rápida y sencilla y es excelente como guarnición del plato principal y como ensalada.
INGREDIENTES
400 g de pasta Mattini
1 cabeza de cebolla morada (también puede ser negra)
1-2 dientes de ajo
1 zanahoria
3-4 encurtidos
una taza de maíz dulce
1 taza de yogur de 180 gr
asi que
150-200 g de queso feta
2 huevos duros
primero
pimiento picante dulce
#ensalada # recetas

ga.title: Sailéad le blas Paradise - sailéad le macaróin
ga.description:
Is é an sailéad SEVENTH HEAVEN ceann de na sailéid pasta is fearr liom. Tá sé comhdhéanta de go leor glasraí agus tugann iógart blas iontach athnuachana dó. Déantar an sailéad seo le pasta go han-tapa agus go héasca agus tá sé ar fheabhas mar mhias taobh leis an bpríomh-mhias agus mar bhéile sailéid.
COMHÁBHAIR
400 g pasta Mattini
1 cheann oinniún corcra (is féidir a bheith dubh freisin)
1-2 clóibh gairleoige
1 cairéad
3-4 picil
cupán arbhar milis
1 cupán iógart de 180 gr
mar sin
150-200 g de cháis feta
2 ubh bhruite
ar dtús
piobar spíosrach milis
#salad #recipes

pl.title: Sałatka o smaku raju
pl.description:
Sałatka SIÓDME NIEBO to jedna z moich ulubionych sałatek makaronowych. Zawiera dużo warzyw i jogurtu, który nadaje jej cudownie orzeźwiający smak. Ta sałatka z makaronem jest przygotowywana bardzo szybko i łatwo i jest doskonała jako dodatek do dania głównego oraz jako danie sałatkowe.
SKŁADNIKI
400 g makaronu Mattini
1 główka fioletowej cebuli (może być również czarna)
1-2 ząbki czosnku
1 marchewka
3-4 pikle
kubek słodkiej kukurydzy
1 szklanka jogurtu 180 gr
więc
150-200 g sera feta
2 jajka na twardo
pierwszy
słodka ostra papryka
#sałatka #przepisy

nl.title: Salade met paradijselijke smaak - salade met macaroni
nl.description:
De SEVENTH HEAVEN-salade is een van mijn favoriete pastasalades. Het bestaat uit veel groenten en yoghurt geeft het een heerlijke verfrissende smaak. Deze salade met pasta is heel snel en gemakkelijk gemaakt en leent zich uitstekend als bijgerecht bij het hoofdgerecht en als salade maaltijd.
INGREDIËNTEN
400 g pasta Mattini
1 kropje paarse ui (kan ook zwart zijn)
1-2 teentjes knoflook
1 wortel
3-4 augurken
een kopje suikermaïs
1 kopje yoghurt van 180 gr
zo
150-200 g fetakaas
2 gekookte eieren
eerste
zoete pikante peper
#salade #recepten

hu.title: Paradicsomízű saláta - saláta makarónival
hu.description:
A HETEDIK ÉG saláta az egyik kedvenc tésztasaláta. Sok zöldségből áll, és a joghurt csodálatos frissítő ízt kölcsönöz neki. Ez a tésztával készült saláta nagyon gyorsan és egyszerűen elkészül, kiválóan alkalmas a főétel köretéül és saláta ételként.
ÖSSZETEVŐK
400 g tészta Mattini
1 fej lila hagyma (fekete is lehet)
1-2 gerezd fokhagyma
1 sárgarépa
3-4 savanyúság
egy csésze csemegekukorica
1 csésze joghurt 180 gr
így
150-200 g feta sajt
2 főtt tojás
első
édes fűszeres bors
#saláta #receptek

iw.title: סלט בטעם גן עדן - סלט עם מקרונים
iw.description:
סלט השביעי הוא אחד מסלטי הפסטה האהובים עלי. הוא מורכב מהרבה ירקות ויוגורט מעניק לו טעם מרענן נפלא. סלט זה עם פסטה מיוצר במהירות ובקלות רבה והוא מצוין כתוספת למנה העיקרית וכארוחת סלט.
רכיבים
400 גרם פסטה מאטיני
1 ראש בצל סגול (יכול להיות גם שחור)
1-2 שיני שום
גזר אחד
3-4 חמוצים
כוס תירס מתוק
1 כוס יוגורט של 180 גרם
כך
150-200 גרם גבינת פטה
2 ביצים מבושלות
ראשון
פלפל חריף מתוק
# סלט # מתכונים

ro.title: Salată cu aromă de paradis - salată cu macaroane
ro.description:
Salata SEVENTH HEAVEN este una dintre salatele mele preferate de paste. Se compune dintr-o mulțime de legume și iaurtul îi conferă un gust răcoritor minunat. Această salată cu paste se face foarte repede și ușor și este excelentă ca garnitură la felul principal și ca salată.
INGREDIENTE
400 g paste Mattini
1 cap de ceapă mov (poate fi și negru)
1-2 căței de usturoi
1 morcov
3-4 murături
o cană de porumb dulce
1 cana de iaurt de 180 gr
asa de
150-200 g brânză feta
2 ouă fierte
primul
piper dulce picant
#salad #recipes

el.title: Σαλάτα με παράδεισο - σαλάτα με μακαρόνια
el.description:
Η σαλάτα SEVENTH HEAVEN είναι μια από τις αγαπημένες μου σαλάτες ζυμαρικών. Αποτελείται από πολλά λαχανικά και το γιαούρτι του δίνει μια υπέροχη δροσιστική γεύση. Αυτή η σαλάτα με ζυμαρικά παρασκευάζεται πολύ γρήγορα και εύκολα και είναι εξαιρετική ως δευτερεύον πιάτο στο κύριο πιάτο και ως γεύμα σαλάτας.
ΣΥΣΤΑΤΙΚΑ
400 g ζυμαρικά Mattini
1 κεφαλή μοβ κρεμμυδιού (μπορεί επίσης να είναι μαύρο)
1-2 σκελίδες σκόρδο
1 καρότο
3-4 τουρσιά
ένα φλιτζάνι γλυκό καλαμπόκι
1 φλιτζάνι γιαούρτι 180 γρ
Έτσι
150-200 g τυριού φέτα
2 βραστά αυγά
πρώτα
γλυκό πικάντικο πιπέρι
# σαλάτα # συνταγές

bg.title: Салата с райски вкус - салата с макарони
bg.description:
Салата СЕДМО НЕБО е една от любимите ми салати с паста. Състои се от много зеленчуци, а киселото мляко му придава прекрасен освежаващ вкус. Тази салата с тестени изделия се прави много бързо и лесно и е отлична като гарнитура към основното ястие и като ястие за салата.
СЪСТАВКИ
400 г паста Матини
1 глава лилав лук (може и черен)
1-2 скилидки чесън
1 морков
3-4 кисели краставички
чаша сладка царевица
1 чаша кисело мляко от 180 гр
така
150-200 г сирене фета
2 варени яйца
първо
сладък пикантен пипер

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We’ve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here’s what we created. Aren’t 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let’s try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you’ll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 — How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 — DIY ring 

2:48 — Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 — DIY hair comb 

6:53 — Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 — DIY fake nails
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. snippet.title: Film Theory: The Dark Truth of Wanda's STOLEN Children! (WandaVision)
snippet.description:
Subscribe to never miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH      

"For the children." That's the phrase that keeps coming up in WandaVsion. For a while, I thought that meant the missing children of the town but last week we got to see them again. Then I thought it meant HER children, Billy and Tommy, whose mysterious appearance has left many questions so far unanswered. Theorists, there is SO MUCH to unpack when it comes to the Hex, Wanda's kids, and what reality actually means anymore. Get ready to get mystical!

snippet.title: Sen Çal Kapımı 33. Bölüm 1. Fragmanı
snippet.description:
Sen Çal Kapımı 33. Bölüm 1. Fragmanı

Hayatta bütün umutlarını eğitimine bağlayan Eda, yurtdışı eğitim bursunu keserek lise mezunu kalmasına neden olan Serkan Bolat’la karşı karşıya gelir. Serkan Bolat, kendisiyle iki ay nişanlı taklidi yaparsa Eda’ya bursunu geri vermeyi teklif eder. Eda nefret ettiği bu adamın teklifini önce reddetse de koşullar değişince kabul etmek zorunda kalır. Nişanlı taklidi yaparken, Serkan ve Eda , bütün doğru bildiklerini unutturacak, tutkulu, zorlu bir ilişki yaşamaya başlarlar. Çünkü aşk zordur. Ve bu yüzden muhteşemdir.

Oyuncular:
HANDE ERÇEL
KEREM BÜRSİN
NESLİHAN YELDAN
EVRİM DOĞAN
ANIL İLTER
MELİSA DÖNGEL
ÇAĞRI ÇITANAK
ELÇİN AFACAN
SİTARE AKBAŞ
BAŞAK GÜMÜLCİNELİOĞLU
ALİCAN AYTEKİN
SARP BOZKURT
İLKYAZ ARSLAN
İLAYDA ÇEVİK

Oyuncular:
HANDE ERÇEL
KEREM BÜRSİN
NESLİHAN YELDAN
EVRİM DOĞAN
ANIL İLTER
MELİSA DÖNGEL
ÇAĞRI ÇITANAK
ELÇİN AFACAN
SİTARE AKBAŞ
BAŞAK GÜMÜLCİNELİOĞLU
ALİCAN AYTEKİN
SARP BOZKURT
İLKYAZ ARSLAN
İLAYDA ÇEVİK

snippet.title: Dodge Challenger Demon v Porsche 911 Turbo S - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

It’s time for an almighty USA vs Germany drag race! 

Mat’s in the absolutely huge Dodge Challenge Demon, and he’s lining up against Yianni in the Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

When you compare them on paper, it looks like the Dodge has it in the bag. With a humungous 6.2-litre supercharged V8 under its massive bonnet, the Challenge Demon can put down 808hp and 972Nm! As a result, it seemingly dwarfs the 911 Turbo S, which has a 3.8-litre twin-turbo flat-six, which can produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

But of course, this isn’t the first time we’ve driven a Porsche 911 Turbo S on this channel, and we know you’re pretty much guaranteed a 1/4 mile time of less than 10.5 seconds! 

So how do you think this will play out? Will the Dodge be able to put its power down? Or is the Porsche set to grab another victory? 

You’ll have to keep watching to find out!

Thanks to CS Panda for lending us the Dodge - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxwBVsAoWWkQjKmSKOx5u2A

snippet.title: Gather for the Short Nite Film Festival in Fortnite Party Royale!
snippet.description:
Fortnite Presents Short Nite comes to the Big Screen in Party Royale on Feb 20 at 2 PM ET. Info: https://fn.gg/ShortNite

Grab some friends, head on over to the Big Screen and watch some great animated short films. Sit back, relax, and chomp on some JUMBO popcorn while you watch the festival. Starting the day before Short Nite — February 19, 2021, at 7 PM ET — the new Jumbo Popcorn Emote will be available in the Item Shop. The bucket’s so big you’re gonna have to take a seat for this one.

snippet.title: What’s Next for Perseverance Mars Rover? Sol 1 Press Conference
snippet.description:
Now that our mighty Perseverance Mars rover has landed – what’s next? Hear from mission experts who will provide a status update on the rover and what needs to be done before the science mission kicks into full gear.

Speakers:
• George Tahu, program executive for Mars & Lunar Exploration, NASA
• Adam Steltzner, Mars 2020 chief engineer, JPL
• Pauline Hwang, assistant strategic mission manager, JPL
• Hallie Gengl, instrument data systems operation lead for Multimission Image-Processing Laboratory, JPL
• Aaron Stehura, Entry, Descent & Landing flight system engineer, JPL
• Katie Stack Morgan, deputy project scientist, JPL

Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: YouTubers have to declare ads. Why doesn't anyone else?
snippet.description:
Around the world, there are regulations for "influencers". Those regulations make sure that if someone is paid to endorse a product, they have to declare that payment to the people watching. But why does no-one on TV, or film, or anywhere else have to do that?

👥👥 CREDITS 👥👥

Written and performed by TOM SCOTT https://www.tomscott.com/
Script assistant ANDREA MARKS
Animation BILLY CRINION https://twitter.com/BillyCrinion and WILLIAM MARLER https://wmad.co.uk
Dubbing mixer GRAHAM HAERTHER

"Does the Spearmint Lose Its Flavor on the Bedpost Overnight" by Rose/Broom/Breuer (1924), arranged for orchestra by BENJAMIN SQUIRES https://www.benjaminsquires.co.uk/

Thanks to EVAN EDINGER, JESSICA ENDOYAN, CHRISTINA HERNANDEZ, the TINY SPECK team, and SAM VALIANT

Filmed safely: https://www.tomscott.com/safe/

© Pad 26 Limited MMXXI

📄📄 SOURCES 📄📄

💵 PAYMENT AND CONTROL
Lonnie Donegan changing Spearmint: mentioned in a lot of places, but I can't find a contemporary account.
Ray Davies flying: https://twitter.com/thekinks/status/1265203792754212864 and https://www.cbc.ca/radio/undertheinfluence/why-ray-davies-flew-26-000-km-to-save-lola-1.5009086
BBC trademark policy: https://www.bbc.co.uk/programmes/articles/5R152hTbVPQdYjn29q5jt4/16-songs-banned-by-the-bbc
Pitbull and Kodak: https://twitter.com/pitbull/status/16567622829080576
Pitbull and Voli: https://voli305vodka.com/ "Owned and operated by Armando Christian Perez, aka Pitbull"
Gucci on Lil Pump: no quotes, but given the lyrics and video, it's safe to say they didn't have control
YMCA reaction: https://news.google.com/newspapers?nid=1346&dat=19790329&id=M3VRAAAAIBAJ&sjid=uPoDAAAAIBAJ&pg=7192,10172867

✔️ YOU HAVE TO DECLARE IT
US Code Title 15: https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/15
Nikkie de Jager, One Dip Makeup Challenge: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CA18hTShwpk
Disclosures 101 for Social Media Influencers [PDF]: https://www.ftc.gov/system/files/documents/plain-language/1001a-influencer-guide-508_1.pdf
An Influencer’s Guide to making clear that ads are ads [PDF]: https://www.asa.org.uk/uploads/assets/uploaded/3af39c72-76e1-4a59-b2b47e81a034cd1d.pdf
The FTC’s Endorsement Guides: What People Are Asking: https://www.ftc.gov/tips-advice/business-center/guidance/ftcs-endorsement-guides-what-people-are-asking
YouTube declaration: https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/154235

❌ NO-ONE ELSE HAS TO DECLARE IT
McFlurry: https://adage.com/article/adages/30-rock-mcflurry-scene-paid-placement/134689

snippet.title: NASA's Perseverance rover successfully lands on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch live as NASA attempts to land the Perseverance rover on Mars! Confirmation of a successful landing at Jezero Crater is expected around 3:55 pm Eastern (20:55 UTC), if everything goes to plan. The NASASpaceflight team will be providing live coverage of all of the critical events leading up to landing through to (hopefully) the first images from Perseverance on the Red Planet. 

Forum Coverage: https://forum.nasaspaceflight.com/index.php?topic=38208.0

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Tuesday, February 2, Starship serial number 9 (SN9) completed SpaceX’s second high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 kilometers in altitude. SN9 successfully performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.

The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. During the landing flip maneuver, one of the Raptor engines did not relight and caused SN9 to land at high speed and experience a RUD.

These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: 7 Minutes to Mars: NASA's Perseverance Rover Attempts Most Dangerous Landing Yet
snippet.description:
All landings on Mars are difficult, but NASA's Perseverance rover is attempting to touch down in the most challenging terrain on Mars ever targeted. 

The intense entry, descent, and landing phase, known as EDL, begins when the spacecraft reaches the top of the Martian atmosphere. Engineers have referred to the time it takes to land on Mars as the "seven minutes of terror."

The landing sequence is complex and targeting a location like Jezero Crater on Mars is only possible because of new landing technologies known as  Range Trigger and Terrain-Relative Navigation. 

The Perseverance rover is set to land on the surface of Mars on February 18, 2021. 

For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance

Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech
